     the Fermi energy is    -0.3755 ev

!    total energy              =  -11771.83537997 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          7.6E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.08776703 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -11771.74761294 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -239014.33335003 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  120612.96022189 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4211.07058616 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  110843.71287132 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -3.01676996 Ry

     total magnetization       =    43.00 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    53.62 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  30 iterations
